personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS / Python / SQL Data Platform Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep strength in Python, SQL, ETL/ELT, data warehousing, operational reporting, and production data platform support. Experienced building and operating cloud-aligned data pipelines using AWS services, PySpark/Spark, data quality validation, monitoring, documentation, and CI/CD-aware delivery practices. Strong fit for broad data engineering roles requiring data lake/warehouse pipelines, automation, operational support, performance tuning, and clear documentation across business and technical teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and supported automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable, monitored data workflows for capacity, reporting, and analytics use cases.
Built a hybrid AWS and Oracle data platform with S3 landing patterns, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift forecasting workloads, and structured reporting outputs for leadership and operational stakeholders.
Designed and optimized schemas, SQL queries, retention structures, and reporting datasets to support large-scale historical analysis, data quality checks, and performance-aware decision-making.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS and worked with CI/CD-aware delivery practices, Git workflows, testing, documentation, and operational readiness patterns for data pipeline delivery.

Created monitoring, alerting, dashboards, and operational reporting around production data flows, capacity trends, infrastructure utilization, and exception handling to improve reliability and supportability.

Developed forecasting and analytics pipelines using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and visualization libraries to turn infrastructure and application telemetry into actionable business insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems, transforming performance and user-experience telemetry into engineering recommendations and operational dashboards.
Led the FAST project by data-mining synthetic and real-user performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities for high-value digital systems.
Upgraded Dynatrace AppMon from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no regression in production monitoring coverage during cutover.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and cloud-migration teams to evaluate AWS readiness, monitoring coverage, and operational risks.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large enterprise environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting production monitoring, dashboards, alerts, and operational reporting.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation scripts to extract, transform, and publish performance data, reducing manual weekly reporting effort and improving consistency.
Designed management modules, dashboards, SLA thresholds, and technical documentation adopted across client environments for production support and troubleshooting.
Worked with J2EE, WebLogic, WebSphere, Oracle, SQL, Unix/Linux, and infrastructure teams to identify bottlenecks and improve application reliability.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, validating large transaction datasets and preserving performance through phased migration.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI data access and validation utilities to verify migration correctness across millions of records and improve reliability of core transaction processing.
Optimized schemas, queries, and transaction-processing logic to reduce infrastructure footprint while maintaining sub-second query behavior for critical workloads.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell / Ksh, Java, C++, XML, JSON
skills.Cloud & Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, EC2, ECS, cloud data platform patterns, data lakes, data warehouses, operational data stores; Azure/GCP concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, batch processing, data acquisition, aggregation, data modeling, data quality validation, reconciliation, metadata, automated reporting
skills.Big Data & Warehousing: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hive/Hadoop, Parquet, dimensional modeling, star schema, fact/dimension modeling, MPP/data warehouse concepts
skills.Databases & SQL: Advanced SQL, Oracle, Oracle RAC, PostgreSQL, MySQL, schema design, query optimization, partitioning concepts, stored procedures, permissions concepts
skills.Orchestration & Delivery: Airflow, job scheduling concepts, CI/CD concepts, Git, GitHub Actions concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, documentation, code reviews, testing practices
skills.Containers & Runtime: Docker, ECS, containerized Python jobs, Kubernetes concepts/active learning, secure runtime and secrets-management concepts
skills.Monitoring & Operations: CloudWatch concepts, Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, alerting, dashboards, incident support, runbooks, production troubleshooting
skills.Analytics & Visualization: Pandas, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, executive reporting, operational dashboards, Power BI/Tableau familiarity

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, and Bedrock-oriented AI integration concepts. Focused on ingestion, transformation, columnar storage, query optimization, and documentation for cloud data engineering workflows.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics engine for infrastructure telemetry, replacing manual forecasting workflows with repeatable pipelines, validation steps, and Streamlit dashboards for leadership-facing capacity insights.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline for job intake, semantic duplicate detection, LLM-assisted scoring, tailored resume/cover JSON generation, quality gates, and application tracking, using structured artifacts and reproducible workflow steps.
